notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: record's exact address+phone (115 S Grove Ave Ste 204, Elgin, IL 60120, (847) 608-1122) is corroborated by multiple independent directories (Wellness.com, YellowPages, hub.biz) as 'Riverbend Dentistry,' NOT 'ProCare Dental Group, P.C.' ProCare Dental Group's own official website (procaredentalgroup.com/locations/) lists exactly 10 current offices (Arlington Heights [main], Park Ridge, McHenry, Wheaton, Gurnee, Crystal Lake, Evanston, Naperville, Chicago, Lake Zurich) and NONE are in Elgin, indicating this address is not part of ProCare's current active network. Some legacy sources associate a 'Riverbend Dentistry' brand with procaredentalgroup.com, but at a DIFFERENT Elgin address (1670 Capital St Ste 501, Elgin IL 60124, phone 608-1144, dentist Brunetti) -- a distinct location from this record. One Yelp listing still titles this address 'Procare Dental Groups PC,' suggesting a recent/incomplete rebrand or directory staleness. Could not locate a genuine standalone official website for 115 S Grove Ave; only third-party directory aggregators corroborate. No doctors listed to avoid fabrication given conflicting directory claims (one source says Dr. Jackie Garcia, others say Brunetti, for what may be two different addresses).

Site address (2415 Bowes Rd. Ste. 110, Elgin, IL 60123) and phone (847-386-4300) exact-match the record. Owner Dr. Yousaf Ahmad matches legal entity name 'Yousaf Ahmad DDS LLC'. No careers/hiring page found in navigation or footer. Single-location family practice, no DSO/multi-location affiliation shown.

owner_operator_stated: Drs. Michael Finger and Anthony Bennett

Finger & Bennett, Ltd.' exactly. Associate Dr. Odin Waite also affiliated. This is a specialist oral & maxillofacial surgery practice (established 1977), not a general dentistry office. No hiring/careers page located.

vendor_website_hint (dentalandbraces.com / 'All Family Dental & Braces') is WRONG for this record -- that site's location list does not include this Elgin/Larkin Ave address and its main phone (312-946-2095) does not match. The practice actually operates publicly as 'Smile for Life Dental' at drdeanlodding.com: exact address (2001 Larkin Ave Ste 120, Elgin, IL 60123) and phone (847-697-1111) match, owner Dean Lodding DDS matches legal entity name 'Dean Lodding Smiles, Ltd' exactly. No hiring/careers page found on the site.

Site address (615 S. Randall Road, Elgin, IL 60123) and phone ((847) 697-5100) exact-match the record. Two dentists shown: Dr. Ketaki Shah DDS and Dr. Purav Shah DMD; Purav Shah matches record name 'Shah Purav DMD' exactly (appears to be a family practice). No careers/hiring page found.
